title: Beef Cutlet with Stir Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish that combines the flavors of beef and stir-fry. Perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef cutlet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
Remove the beef from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the pan.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the mixed vegetables and cooked rice to the pan.
Stir in the soy sauce and smoked paprika.
Return the beef cutlet to the pan and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the beef is coated in the stir-fry sauce.
